title: How the Strait of Hormuz Will Start World War 3 | Prof Jiang Explains
full_text: So this is a map and this map even even if you don't really know the war, even if you don't know the participants, even if you don't know the weaponry, this map will tell you exactly how this war will progress. This one area is the nexus, the pivot of the world. Let me explain why. First of all, from the GCC, you have 20% of all the world's oil flowing through this narrow straight. Where does it go, guys? It goes to Asia, India, Pakistan, South Korea, China, Japan. India depends on 60% of its oil from this area. China depends on 40%. Japan 75%. Then that is the basis of the value of the US dollar. So if the GCC collapses, the American economy and American empire both collapse at the same time. The problem though is the GCC is an artificial construct of empire. It does not exist naturally. Why? Because that's no food. That's no oil, no water. Okay guys, no food, no water.
